trigger_sentence: WHEN E3_SOURCE_HASH APPEARS ON BRANCH_RAW THEN FIRE E3_GATE; WHEN E3_GATE IS OPEN THEN RUN ONE CONTROLLED NETWORK_LANGUAGE_INTERPRETER BRIDGE
network_role: trigger surface for a controlled interpreter bridge
executor_role: observer and interpreter; not replaced by the network state itself
truth_boundary: E3 source is a network-state trigger target. It does not execute code by itself; a controlled executor observes branch Raw release before running the interpreter bridge.
